tool_description: Get cricket statistics, including player, team, and match data

functions.name: get_player_stats
functions.description: Get player statistics, including batting and bowling averages

functions.name: get_team_stats
functions.description: Get team statistics, including win-loss record and points

functions.name: get_match_stats
functions.description: Get match statistics, including score and result

code:
import requests
import pandas as pd

def get_player_stats(player_name):
    url = f'https://hs-consumer-api.espncricinfo.com/v1/pages/player/surname/{player_name}'
    response = requests.get(url)
    data = response.json()
    player_data = data['player']['profile']
    batting_average = player_data['batting']['average']
    bowling_average = player_data['bowling']['average']
    return {'batting_average': batting_average, 'bowling_average': bowling_average}

def get_team_stats(team_name):
    url = f'https://hs-consumer-api.espncricinfo.com/v1/pages/team/name/{team_name}'
    response = requests.get(url)
    data = response.json()
    team_data = data['team']['profile']
    wins = team_data['wins']
    losses = team_data['losses']
    points = team_data['points']
    return {'wins': wins, 'losses': losses, 'points': points}

def get_match_stats(match_id):
    url = f'https://hs-consumer-api.espncricinfo.com/v1/pages/match/{match_id}'
    response = requests.get(url)
    data = response.json()
    match_data = data['match']['scorecard']
    score = match_data['score']
    result = match_data['result']
    return {'score': score, 'result': result}
